raw_transcript: Yes. Those bacteria can compete for nutrients like Vitamin B12 and interfering with fat absorption. I’m ordering a Lactulose Breath Test. You'll drink a sugar solution and blow into a tube every fifteen minutes. We're looking for spikes in hydrogen or methane gas.
final_corrected_note: Yes. Those bacteria can compete for nutrients like Vitamin B12 and interfering with fat absorption. I’m ordering a Lactulose Breath Test. You'll drink a sugar solution and blow into a tube every fifteen minutes. We're looking for spikes in hydrogen or methane gas.
